daily.baseball_pulse:
MY TEAM

There is no relevant news for your roster today.

MY PROSPECTS

No prospect news today.

AROUND THE LEAGUE

Francisco Lindor has been placed on the injured list by the Mets, removing a top-tier offensive asset from circulation. The Nationals recalled Riley Cornelio for his MLB debut, offering a potential depth addition off waivers tomorrow. The Rangers selected Peyton Gray and designated Willie MacIver for assignment, while the Red Sox recalled Payton Tolle who dominated with 11 strikeouts in his debut start. The Phillies released Taijuan Walker and the White Sox designated Lucas Sims for assignment, both clearing cap space and closing opportunities.

BASEBALL TODAY

Jacob deGrom continues his elite start with 10 strikeouts in five innings as the Rangers improve to 5-0 in his starts. The Cubs swept their homestand over the Mets and Phillies while winning nine straight, demolishing the NL East's payroll as the Phillies extended their losing streak to nine games. Payton Tolle struck out the first five batters of his MLB debut and Mason Miller extended his scoreless streak to 33.2 innings, tying a Padres franchise record.
